puzzle.title: The Steadfast Witnesses
puzzle.intro: Imagine a time when belief was tested by fire, and unwavering conviction became the ultimate defiance. You are tasked with uncovering the identity of a group whose story is recounted in the Quran, a narrative of profound faith against overwhelming tyranny. Unravel the clues to discover who these souls were, and the extraordinary circumstances they faced.
clues: We stood firm in our conviction, despite immense pressure to renounce our faith.
We were targeted by a powerful ruler who sought to extinguish the light of monotheism.
We witnessed great signs and miracles, yet our oppressors remained heedless.
We endured a gruesome method of persecution designed to terrorize others into submission.
We were cast into a blazing inferno, yet our steadfastness earned us a lofty station with Allah.
Our story is recounted in a Surah named after celestial constellations, warning of the fate of those who persecute believers.

trial.label: Our Persecution
options: Being consumed by a scorching wind
Being cast into a fiery trench
trial.answer: Being cast into a fiery trench

outcome.label: Our Ultimate Fate
options: They were granted a kingdom on earth.
They were saved by a miraculous escape.
They achieved martyrdom and eternal reward.
They were transformed into a different species.
They were given immense wealth and prosperity.
outcome.answer: They achieved martyrdom and eternal reward.

puzzle.arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
puzzle.verse: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy, (85:8)
